body_txt: If the eyes are the windows to the soul, this person has a very... persuasive ... compelling ... even possessive soul. With little more than a few words intoned in their deep, Compelling Voice , any fool gazing into their eyes will be hopelessly hypnotized . The mind control victim who has gazed too long into this abyss will likely develop Mind-Control Eyes . High power Hypnotic Eyes (or when broadcast) may function like a Hypno Ray and work on several onlookers at once. If the hypnotist is using glasses, then it's likely a Mind-Control Device instead of this trope.
